commands.review_summary:
The PR removes the `/skills` toolbar count text, keeps the Clear control for filtered states, right-aligns List/Grid controls, and adds Vitest assertions that count copy stays hidden.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main renders `${model.sorted.length} results` while `sorted` is derived from paginated loaded rows; I verified that path by source inspection.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed because the patch has no actionable findings; maintainer review and merge decision remain the next action.

target.title: fix: remove skills browse count copy
target.body:
## Summary

- Remove the `/skills` toolbar count copy entirely instead of showing a loaded-result count.
- Keep the Clear control available for search/category/featured filtered states.
- Preserve the List/Grid toolbar alignment when the count area is absent.
- Add coverage for empty, paginated browse, search pagination, and category-filtered states to ensure no loaded-count copy appears.

## Verification

- `bun run test src/__tests__/skills-index.test.tsx src/__tests__/skills-index-load-more.test.tsx`
- `bun run format:check -- src/routes/skills/index.tsx src/__tests__/skills-index.test.tsx src/styles.css`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit`
- `bun run lint`
- `bun run ci:static`
- Local browser check at `http://127.0.0.1:3000/skills`: toolbar rendered `List` / `Grid` with no `loaded` or `results` count copy.
target.author: jesse-merhi
